title: WB Weather Update: ঝড়-বৃষ্টিতে মনোরম আবহাওয়া দক্ষিণবঙ্গে, রয়েছে কালবৈশাখীর পূর্বাভাস - Duranta Barta
article_text:
For Bengali readers in India and beyond, Duranta Barta is a legacy. Still one of the leading print media in India, the publication has become a representative of Bengali culture itself.
            Our digital journey started in 2018 with the launch of Durantbartaস্থানীয় খবর
